name: Maya the Freelance Brand Designer
summary: A freelance brand designer running a solo practice in the design services industry. Maya bills clients hourly and looks for every efficiency gain possible. She prioritizes white-labeling and polished client-facing experiences to maintain her professional reputation.
goals: Save 10+ minutes per project through faster templating and streamlined asset export
Create a polished client share view with her own branding, not the tool's logo
Build reusable brand kits for each client to maintain consistency across deliverables
Manage client feedback via comment threading directly in the platform
pains: Client share view shows tool branding, undermining her professional image
Asset export adds unnecessary steps to every project delivery
motivations: Every minute saved is money earned — billing hourly makes efficiency directly profitable
Maintaining a professional branded experience to justify premium rates
objections: Not paying for a platform that still shows its own logo in client-facing views
White-labeling may cost extra — needs clear ROI before upgrading
channels: Brand kit and asset library pages
decision_triggers: Sees white-label client share demo that removes platform branding
Calculates time savings multiplied across monthly client volume
Peer designer recommends it for client-facing work
sample_quotes: I bill clients hourly so anything that saves me 10 minutes per project is worth real money. Can your client share view be white-labeled?
My clients shouldn't see what tool I'm using — they should just see my brand.
I need brand kits that actually persist so I'm not rebuilding from scratch each time.

journey_stages.mindset: Evaluating whether the tool saves enough time to justify cost
Building first client project, testing professional delivery features

source_evidence.claim: Freelance Brand Designer, solo practice in design services
Client share view shows tool branding, undermining professional image
Asset export adds unnecessary steps to project delivery
Save 10+ minutes per project through efficiency gains
Create polished client share view with own branding
Build reusable brand kits for client consistency
Manage client feedback via comment threading in platform
Billing hourly makes every minute saved directly profitable
Professional branded experience justifies premium rates
Not paying for platform that shows its own logo in client views
White-labeling may cost extra — needs clear ROI
